scope_contract: In --changed-files mode this inspector emits findings for the listed files and tags each finding with introduced_in_diff: bool per Mechanism (ii). Findings with introduced_in_diff: false are advisory/non-blocking per the default-safe rule (AC-2.6(b)). Global detector results are reported in mandatory_script_outputs.observations, NOT in findings.* arrays.
diff_aware_contract: Mechanism (ii): inspector-side tagging. Each finding in --changed-files mode carries an explicit introduced_in_diff field. Absent/null/untagged findings are non-blocking per AC-2.6 default-safe rule.

detect_orphan_scripts.false_positive_note: Codex identified the 13 scripts/todo/*.py entries as false positives: these scripts are dynamically loaded by hooks/hook-todo-injection.py via the pattern scripts/todo/{command}.py. Deleting them would break the todo-injection hook convention. They are NOT true orphans. scripts/bulk-commit-nested-run.sh and scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh modified < 7 days ago are protected by the Safety Rules age threshold.

summary.close_gate_rationale: Zero cleanliness violations introduced in this diff. All 8 changed files are correctly placed, correctly named per their folder conventions, and actively referenced. scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py is a new file in scripts/ (correctly placed, kebab-case, referenced by close.md and dev.md). BASH_MAX_CONSECUTIVE update in both CLAUDE.md and pretool-orchestrator-gate.py is consistent. All global detector findings are pre-existing and non-blocking per default-safe rule.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 4 findings with PROPOSED_FIX and 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY: (1) Execute-bit finding for aggregate-dev-report.py was overstated — resolve-dev-report.py, runcode-watchdog.py, and write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py are also non-executable, so no convention violation; downgrade to OBSERVATION_ONLY. (2) Naming convention wording was inaccurate — commands/ uses 'lower' not 'kebab-case'; agents/hooks/scripts use kebab. (3) False positive: product-owner.md is referenced in commands/dev.md lines 139, 183, 193, 209 as a specialist agent; detect-orphan-agents.sh missed this reference form. (4) scripts/todo/*.py entries may be dynamically loaded; mark advisory with caveat rather than actionable. OBSERVATION_ONLY: all 8 changed files correctly placed and named.

findings.issue: Execute-bit finding overstates convention: resolve-dev-report.py, runcode-watchdog.py, write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py are also 100644; aggregate-dev-report.py is not an outlier. Also invoked via python3 explicitly everywhere.
findings.proposed_fix: Reword as OBSERVATION_ONLY: no functional impact; multiple scripts share this mode; not a cleanliness issue unless project adopts a uniform executable-bit rule.
findings.rationale: Confirmed by ls -la. Three peer scripts also lack execute bit. Finding demoted to observations_only. No cleanliness finding raised.

findings.issue: Naming convention wording inaccurate: commands/ folder uses 'lower' convention per README, not 'kebab-case'. Kebab applies to agents/, hooks/, scripts/ only.
findings.proposed_fix: Distinguish naming conventions by folder: kebab for agents/hooks/scripts, lower for commands.
findings.rationale: Corrected in per_file_audit notes for the three commands/ files. No violation in either case — all names are lowercase with hyphens, satisfying both conventions.

findings.issue: False positive: product-owner.md is not truly orphaned. commands/dev.md references it at lines 139, 183, 193, 209 as a specialist agent.
findings.proposed_fix: Mark detector_false_positive: true, safe_to_delete: false, recommendation: none.
findings.rationale: Verified via grep. detect-orphan-agents.sh does not detect inline specialist-routing references in commands/dev.md. Finding is a detector false positive documented in mandatory_script_outputs.detect_orphan_agents diff_scoping_note.

findings.issue: scripts/todo/*.py may be dynamically loaded by hook convention; classifying them as actionable orphans risks triggering Safety Rule violations.
findings.proposed_fix: Mark introduced_in_diff: false, safe_to_delete: false, blocking: false with dynamic-loading caveat in observations.
findings.rationale: All scripts/todo/*.py are pre-existing and outside this diff's scope. Advisory-only status and dynamic-loading caveat applied in mandatory_script_outputs.detect_orphan_scripts.false_positive_note.

findings.issue: OBSERVATION_ONLY: All 8 changed files are correctly placed and named. scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py is a new functional script with confirmed references in close.md and dev.md.
findings.rationale: Confirms inspector's clean verdict for all diff files.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 4 PROPOSED_FIX items applied: (1) execute-bit finding demoted to observations_only; (2) naming-convention wording corrected per-folder in per_file_audit; (3) product-owner.md false positive documented with detector_false_positive note; (4) scripts/todo/*.py marked advisory-only with dynamic-loading caveat. OBSERVATION_ONLY item logged.
